prompt: Maintain the composition, characters, vehicles, background, layout, camera angle, and scene content of the reference image. Redraw as a completed manuscript for a 1990s Japanese street racer manga. Convert the entire screen to a high-quality black-and-white manga manuscript with G-pen lines, detailed cross-hatching, and screen tones. Depict everything including hair and vehicle bodies with manga techniques. [Dynamic Feeling] Bold speed lines, flow lines, and concentration lines. [Vibration] Add fine vertical vibration lines to characters and car parts to express engine and high-speed vibration. [Characters] Serious expressions and sweating from concentration. [Vehicles] Maintain design but add manga-style tire deformation and drift angles. [Onomatopoeia] Add one giant hand-drawn sound effect like GYAAAA that dominates the frame. Prioritize visual impact over readability. [Finishing] No dialogue or watermarks. Final result must look like a professional 1990s manga magazine page.
